assistant_message.content:
{
  "finding_id": "openscap_006",
  "is_optimal": false,
  "approve": true,
  "feedback": "The remediation plan adopts an Ansible‑based, declarative approach that addresses previous concerns, but it has not yet been executed and still mentions optional explicit VENDOR editing.",
  "concerns": [
    "Explicit VENDOR entry in /etc/os-release is optional and may be unnecessary",
    "Credential handling must be ensured via vault or secret manager",
    "Enabling repositories should be limited to required channels only",
    "Lack of explicit error handling/rollback for failed registration"
  ],
  "suggested_improvements": [
    "Remove unnecessary VENDOR file modification; rely on subscription state",
    "Store activation key/password in Ansible Vault",
    "Enable only baseos and appstream repositories",
    "Add try/catch logic and rollback on registration failures",
    "Include a pre‑run validation step to verify subscription status"
  ],
  "security_score": 7,
  "best_practices_followed": true
}
